case_title: SAN FRANCISCO AUTOCENTER VS LAM, DICK MR.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT LAM, DICK MR. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO AUTOCENTER STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
